[cron:b8685011-a78e-4b55-bbc7-6ce600baecf4 Check if hermes-gateway is running. If not, restart it with…] Check if hermes-gateway is running. If not, restart it with `systemctl --user restart hermes-gateway` and send this exact message to Telegram: "⚠️ Hermes ตายแล้ว กำลัง restart...". Then confirm status with `systemctl --user status hermes-gateway --no-pager | head -10`.
Current time: Sunday, May 10th, 2026 - 8:25 PM (Asia/Bangkok) / 2026-05-10 13:25 UTC

Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly for the current chat. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.
